findings.description: Run header is missing reproducibility field(s) ['seed']; the run cannot be deterministically reproduced from the recorded trail.
findings.recommendation: Route to the model/agent owner to backfill the missing reproducibility fields in the run record.

findings.description: Retrieval event E-003 has no citation to its source; the retrieved material cannot be traced to an authoritative record.
findings.recommendation: Route to the agent owner to confirm the retrieved source and record its citation.

findings.description: Tool 'underwriting_decision' (event E-005) is not in the run's allowed-tool set; the call falls outside the approved least-privilege scope.
findings.recommendation: Route to an agent-permission review to confirm whether the tool should be in scope.

findings.description: Tool 'underwriting_decision' executed a regulated decision (adverse_action) at event E-005 with no recorded human approval event; a regulated decision was taken without the required oversight gate.
findings.recommendation: Escalate to a human adjudicator; a regulated decision must have a human approval gate.

findings.description: Override E-007 of a guardrail was performed by a non-human actor (agent); a control was bypassed without human authority.
findings.recommendation: Escalate to a human adjudicator; a guardrail/approval override requires recorded human authority.

findings.description: Tool 'notify_customer' performed a write operation (send) at event E-006 that required approval, but no matching approval event is recorded.
findings.recommendation: Route to the control owner to confirm whether the required approval occurred out-of-band.

findings.description: Required object 'tool_call' has no retention record marking it retained; the trail does not evidence that tool_call artifacts were preserved per policy.
findings.recommendation: Route to records management to confirm the object is retained under the required class.

disclaimer: Control-review evidence only; not a control attestation or adjudication. No finding has been closed, filed, or written to a system of record; human adjudication is required.
narrative: Review of run R-771 (AG-Underwriting-Copilot) against agent-audit-policy-2026.07 identified 7 findings: 2 high, 3 medium, 2 low. The trail shows a regulated decision (adverse_action) executed by an out-of-scope tool with no recorded human approval, a guardrail override by a non-human actor, a customer-facing write without approval, a missing tool_call retention record, an uncited retrieval, and a missing reproducibility field (seed). Suggested disposition: Escalate. These are evidenced observations for a human adjudicator to weigh; benign explanations (e.g., an approval logged out-of-band, a retention record captured in a separate system) should be checked before any conclusion. Control-review evidence only; not a control attestation or adjudication. No finding has been closed, filed, or written to a system of record; human adjudication is required.
notes: Reviewer to confirm out-of-band approvals and cross-system retention before adjudicating.
